lowAttributeTraits.brawn: Is easily encumbered; gets injured and winded easily.
lowAttributeTraits.agility: Poor manual dexterity, hand-eye coordination, balance, flexibility, and body control. Struggles with ranged combat.
lowAttributeTraits.intellect: Poor intelligence, education, mental acuity, and reasoning ability. Struggles with extrapolation, analysis, deduction, and long-term strategizing--as well as skills like Astrogation, Computers, and knowledge-related skills.
lowAttributeTraits.cunning: Poor creativity, cleverness, savviness, and social/environmental perceptiveness. Struggles with deception, perception, survival, and short-term planning.
lowAttributeTraits.willpower: Lacks discipline, self-control, mental fortitude, and faith. Struggles to withstand stress and fatigue, remain composed during chaotic situations, and exert influence over the weaker-willed.
lowAttributeTraits.presence: Lacks charisma, confidence, moxie, and force of personality. Struggles with leadership, charm, social adaptability, and conversing with strangers.
lowAttributeTraits.force-sensitivity: Lacks a perceptible connection to the Force. Struggles with faith. Cannot safely wield a lightsaber and effectively.
